head.hi: Mr. Hoar, Attorney-General, to Mr. Fish, Secretary of State.

div.p: Sir: I have the honor to inclose a copy of the instructions which have to-day been sent to the district attorney of North Carolina, in relation to the settlement of the case of the Hornet, or Cuba, and which are, I believe, in conformity with the wishes of the President, as communicated by you to me. I inclose with them the bond which has been given by the claimant of the vessel as a condition of the settlement, and a check for twenty-five hundred dollars paid by the claimant in settlement of such of the expenses incurred by the United States in relation to the witnesses, &c., as it has been agreed he should pay.

postscript.p:
Hon. Hamilton Fish,
Secretary of State.
